items.title: Stock Futures Fall After Nvidia Earnings
items.summary: Stocks were on track to fall Thursday as investors shrugged off strong results from artificial intelligence chip maker Nvidia and hoped for progress in the peace talks between the U.S. and Iran.  The three major indexes snapped a three-session losing streak on Wednesday after President Donald Trump said the U.S. was in the final stage of negotiations with Iran to end the war in the Middle East.  Futures were swinging early Thursday, suggesting that the market doesn’t quite know what to make of Nvidia’s first-quarter earnings.
